chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S-170 OF 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE 1. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 12.03.2025 M/s. Mudassir Khan, Sanaullah & Abid Advocates for the Petitioners alongwith Petitioners M/s Abdul Wadood and Waqar Hussain Advocates for the private respondents ASI Sonhro Khan Bullo of PS Babarlo and ASI M. Tehseen of PS New Pind Sukkur -x-x-x-x-x-x- Petitioners are present in Court. Petitioner No.1 states that she has solominized marriage with her own freewill, she has not been abducted by anyone and is living with Petitioner No.2 happily. On notice the mother of Petitioner No.1 and her brother made appearance. On the request of respondent No.7 / mother a meeting was arranged with Petitioner No.1 and after meeting the Petitioner states that she would be happy to reside with Petitioner No.2. Since the Petitioner No.1 has made statement that she has not been abducted as she contracted marriage with her freewill which right guaranteed under the Constitution. In such circumstances, the official respondents and particularly respondent No.4 and SHO P.S. Piryalo in whose jurisdiction the parents of the Petitioner No.1 are residing are directed to ensure that no harm is caused to the Petitioners and ensure their protection in accordance with law. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E MUSHARRAF ALI
